experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Engineered production AI/ML software platform for multi-channel B2B order agent (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) using Claude Sonnet and RAG, delivering end-to-end features across 7 enterprise e-commerce clients processing 1,000+ orders

Developed Python and React internal tooling for data platform operations: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 data storage managing 250+ files

Built ML quality assurance pipeline with automated output validation and human-in-the-loop feedback; optimized prompts and implemented vector-store correction memory, improving model precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Developed Python software abstraction layer over Grafanalib on 3-engineer team for data platform monitoring, achieving 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5) through programmatic dashboard generation
Migrated 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 production Grafana environments with comprehensive unit testing on the dashboard layer, ensuring data visualization reliability

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern

Shipped review submission data pipeline and Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion across agile development sprints

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Architected production AI/ML data platform at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, Python FastAPI backend, multi-tier data infrastructure (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model ML pipeline with Claude (Haiku 4.5 for fast skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking of top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented SSE-streamed progress events to React frontend in real time
Optimized data processing performance with parallel processing of 30+ positions, achieving 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) through dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated ML-powered sleep-stage scoring data platform with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from Sleep-EDF dataset
Developed asynchronous EEG data pipeline using Redis + ARQ: distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn classifiers with per-patient model training
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard for real-time EEG waveform and hypnogram visualization enabling QA review workflows

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Deployed production AI/ML software agent for autonomous lead-qualification SMS platform: FSM-driven data pipeline with intent classification, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking of qualified leads

Engineered multi-service data integration platform: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Live in production processing real-time lead data, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach for Bay Area real estate client
